# MediaPipe Face Landmarker model

`face_landmarker.task` is the float16 version 1 Face Landmarker model bundle
published by Google at:

<https://storage.googleapis.com/mediapipe-models/face_landmarker/face_landmarker/float16/1/face_landmarker.task>

The pinned SHA-256 digest is:

```text
64184e229b263107bc2b804c6625db1341ff2bb731874b0bcc2fe6544e0bc9ff
```

The model and the `@mediapipe/tasks-vision` runtime are licensed under
Apache-2.0. The model is served from this application so camera frames and
inference never depend on a third-party runtime service.
